original: \n\n".concat(_.m.capitalize(e.getCombatName())," stumble").concat(e.isPlural||e.isPlayer()?"":"s"," back, grimacing at the sheer heat of the attack.")
\n\n".concat(_.m.capitalize(e.getCombatName())," duck in time, the attack sailing over ").concat(e.getCombatPronoun("hisher")," head, much to Crimson’s chagrin.")

\n\n[target.combatName] don’t manage to avoid it in time, the superheated metal cutting [target.combatHisHer] side. Crimson chuckles as [target.combatName] hiss".concat(e.isPlayer()||e.isPlural?"":"es"," in pain.")

\n\nReacting quickly, [target.combatName] dash".concat(e.isPlayer()||e.isPlural?"":"es"," back, barely avoiding the scalding tip of her weapon as it cuts through the space [target.combatName] ").concat(e.isPlayer()||e.isPlural?"were":"was"," occupying a moment before. Crimson frowns as she steps back.")

"+textify(s||(s=(0,g.Z)(["[target.CombatName] "," react in time, the attack landing with both enormous strength and unbearable heat. The force of the impact is such that it actually pushes [target.CombatName] back.
			
			[target.CombatName] gasp",", the air knocked out of [target.combatHisHer] lungs. You glare at the smug-looking android as she jumps back."])),e.isPlayer()||e.isPlural?"don’t":"doesn’t",e.isPlural||e.isPlayer()?"":"s")

"+textify(r||(r=(0,g.Z)(["With no time to think, [target.combatName] swing [target.combatHisHer] [target.weaponMelee] to knock her spear off course, somehow managing to deflect it to the side. Still, the burning tip passes way too close for comfort.
			
			Crimson blinks in surprise at [target.combatHisHer] successful defense before jumping back, out of melee range."])))

\n\n"+textify(l||(l=(0,g.Z)(["Crimson moves too fast for [target.combatName] to block or dodge! Her swing strikes true, throwing [target.combatName] off balance and leaving the start of a bruise on the impacted part. Her strength is no joke."])))

"+textify(h||(h=(0,g.Z)(["[target.CombatName] manage to get your [target.weaponMelee] in the way in time to block! It takes all of [target.combatHisHer] strength to avoid stumbling back from the impact, but [target.combatName] manage"," to stay standing, even if the attack forces [target.combatName] back a little.

Crimson stops for a second, perplexed, before jumping back with a frown, not giving target.combatName] a chance of a retaliatory strike."])),e.isPlayer()||e.isPlural?"":"s")
